title: BE-BOP-HIGHSCHOOL
synonyms: ビーバップハイスクール
ビー・バップ・ハイスクール
synopsis: The story revolves around the lives of two rough-and-tumble high school friends, Hiroshi Kato and Toru Nakama, who frequently cause trouble and start fights. In keeping with the spirit of the manga, Toru and Hiroshi style their hair in punch perms and also adopt exaggerated swaggering gaits. The manga also features an assortment of outlandish characters who also sport unusual fashions and hairdos. (Source: Wikipedia) Note: Won the 12th Kodansha Manga Award for general manga in 1988.

titleNative: 「死霊術師など穢らわしい」と処刑されたので、魔族に転身致します
synopsis: A duke's daughter and the crown prince's fiancee... I, Rachel Sheringham, wielded dark attribute magic, which allowed me to use necromancy. I was accused of colluding with demons due to it and was executed. With regret as my source of power, I will return to life as a lich!!! (Source: Takeshobo, translated)

title: Tsuihou Sareta S-kyuu Kanteishi wa Saikyou no Guild wo Tsukuru
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Sareta S-kyuu Kanteishi wa Saikyou no Guild wo Tsukuru
titleNative: 追放されたS級鑑定士は最強のギルドを創る
synopsis: Appraiser Laurent was kicked out from his guild "Golden Hawk." It was a result of one-sided jealousy from the guild leader, Lucius. Feeling hurt and crushed by the sudden dismissal, a female mage named Lilianne gave him a helping hand. Together with her, he decided to create a new guild to mess with Lucius. Eventually, those talents that Laurent found through his appraisal skill will create the strongest guild. (Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

title: How My Cute Girlfriend and I Started a Love Story
titleRomaji: Watashi to Kanojo no Kawaii Koi no Hajimekata
titleEnglish: How My Cute Girlfriend and I Started a Love Story
titleNative: 私と彼女のかわいい恋のはじめ方
synonyms: How to Start a Cute Love Between Me and my Girlfriend
synopsis: Yoshiko Yokozawa is an office lady who loves cute things and being cute herself. Because of this, she is often not taken seriously and she is fed up with it. On the other hand, Chiaki Kurisu, a sales representative from a trading company, always seems very serious when she visits for business. For some reason, Kurisu suddenly invites Yokozawa to dinner!? Outside of work, Kurisu-san is completely different from her usual business-like behavior, being totally open and vulnerable...!? “This woman, is cuter than me!?” You can’t help but fall for her. ♡ Adult girls-love ♡ (Source: Kodansha, translated) Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: Perman
synopsis: From Birdman, a superman from space, he received a mysterious mask and cape. Wearing these, even a slightly clumsy elementary student can transform into Perman, a hero of justice! Rescue the weak, thwart the evil. Together with his three friends, Perman does his best every day to protect peace on Earth

tags.description: Prominently features super-powered humans who aim to serve the greater good.

title: Sacchi Sarenai Rule Breaker
titleNative: 察知されない最強職 (ルール・ブレイカー)
synonyms: The Undetectable Strongest Job: Rule Breaker
synopsis: By some ill fortune, Hikaru died in a traffic accident. He was in heaven standing in line, waiting to be judged, when he took an unexpected request to transfer his soul into a person in another world. He received an ability called Soul Board which he could use to allocate points to Skills to make himself more powerful. But there was a catch… "I want you to take revenge on someone for me within an hour. If you don’t, I’ll destroy your soul." To pull off the task assigned to him, he poured all his available points to the Stealth skill tree. This is a story of a boy who specialised in Stealth. With his skill trees as weapons, he would demonstrate his unrivalled strength in another world.

title: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: My Secret Affection
titleRomaji: Kimi no Koto ga Suki de Ienai.
titleNative: 君のことが好きで言えない。
synonyms: No puedo decirte que te quiero
Ich darf nicht sagen, dass ich dich liebe
synopsis: It’s been thirty years since meteorites from space turned everyone on the Earth gay. In a world where heterosexuality no longer exists, Takanashi Kazusa falls for her childhood friend Ayumu–a boy. Though she’s doing everything she can to act normal whenever they hang out, her love for Ayumu is growing stronger by the day. How much longer can she hide her secret feelings? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Inochi no Tabekata
synopsis: Otogiri Tobi, a 2nd grade middle school student, spends his depressing days searching for his missing older brother alongside his inhuman companion, Baku. Tobi used to rarely speak to anyone besides Baku, however one day after his classmate Shiratama Ryuuko suddenly approaches him, his life begins to change...? This is an adventure surrounding the "human" and the "inhuman" that a lone boy faces. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Dugeundugeun Daejakjeon
synopsis: “Don’t you think we’re missing that heart-fluttering feeling?” From elementary school all the way to high school, Nam Do-yeon and Jeong A-rin have gone from childhood friends to lovers. For a couple who strives for a perfectly rational relationship, a plan to reclaim that one missing piece of excitement. Operation: Heartbeat begins! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleRomaji: Netoge Haijin no Isekai Tenseiki: Ken Ou to Yobareta Saikyou no Kobunshi ga Tsukenai node, 1-nichi 8-jikan Konbou wo Furu Koto kara Hajimeta
titleEnglish: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleNative: ネトゲ廃人の異世界転生記 拳王とよばれた最強の拳が使えないので、1日8時間こん棒を振ることからはじめた
synopsis: Kazuya finally became the strongest player in the VRMMORPG he devoted his life to and gained the title "Fist King." Just as he became number one, he was reborn in another world like the game, where monsters roam free! In this new world where firearms are favored over melee weapons, Kazuya takes up a club to once again pursue his ideal strength! (Source: MangaPlaza)
chapterSourceTitle: Senchi Kara Kaette kita Takashi-kun. Futsuu ni Koukou Seikatsu wo Okuritai

title: Zhang De Tai Xiang BOSS, Jieguo Shì Ren Zhen De Xin Le.
titleRomaji: Zhang De Tai Xiang BOSS, Jieguo Shì Ren Zhen De Xin Le.
titleNative: 长的太像BOSS，结果世人真的信了
synopsis: Su Liang, the King Of The Moon! Master of the Divine Lunar Butterfly, with the power to control time and space, ying and yang, the invincible young man will stand at the pinnacle of this world! So I transmigrated to this world and into this powerful body, sounds like a great start... except it's all bullshit! My familiar is no Lunar Butterfly!! It's just a low-level glow moth that can barely light up a room!!! Now I'm faced with millions of fanatical believers, a battle with the Emperor Cangyue scheduled in three years time, and all of the major sects who see me as a thorn in their eyes... This is… big trouble for a beast-master! (Source: Bilibili, translated)
searchTerms: Zhang De Tai Xiang BOSS, Jieguo Shì Ren Zhen De Xin Le.
